name: Greenville Country Club
description: Greenville Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, AL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Greenville YMCA
description: Greenville YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, AL. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
